name: Forklift hit me but multiple contractors involved in Saint George—how to sort?

mainEntity.name: Forklift hit me but multiple contractors involved in Saint George—how to sort?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Lawyers investigate contracts, witnesses to assign liability.** Utah holds negligent parties accountable.[3] Key factors: (1) General contractor often oversees safety; (2) subs liable for own acts; (3) joint fault shared; (4) discovery reveals.[1][2] Avoid settling early, let attorney subpoena. Multi-party cases yield higher totals.
